title: Define a validated register command
scenario: The application layer should receive a command type, not raw optional DTO fields. Keep command fields private and expose read-only accessors.
instructions: Define RegisterUserCommand with private email and display_name fields, a constructor, and borrowed accessors.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps register-command-value explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
